title: CASE <column> WHEN NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END returns wrong result
poc: SELECT this_column, (CASE WHEN this_column IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS new_column FROM table_two;
SELECT this_column, (CASE this_column WHEN NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS new_column FROM table_two;
key_bug_features: CASE WHEN column IS NULL returns incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50), nullable_column INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, nullable_column) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, nullable_column) VALUES (2, 'test2', NULL);
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN nullable_column IS NULL THEN 'NULL Value' ELSE 'Not NULL' END) AS status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, (CASE nullable_column WHEN NULL THEN 'NULL Value' ELSE 'Not NULL' END) AS status FROM test_table;
